## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's strategy for Surge AI's brand and website redesign, focusing on capturing a pivotal moment for the company.](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Plan to create a high-impact announcement event, leveraging Surge AI's unique story of lean growth to $1B](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Website redesign to balance academic gravitas with broad appeal, showcasing research papers and technical expertise](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Focus on capturing researchers' attention while also reaching a wider audience to create business opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Current Market Position and Impact

  - [Recent article about Surge AI had less impact than expected, partly due to paywall](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [Website traffic increased from 500 to 5,000 views for two days after article](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
  - [Received about five emails from potential new customers looking to switch from competitors](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)

### Brand Positioning Strategy

  - [Lean into anti-hype narrative, emphasizing Surge AI's under-the-radar success](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Showcase technical expertise and research partnerships to instill trust](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [Balance academic gravitas with broader appeal to capture both researchers and wider audience](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)

### Website Redesign Approach

  - [Focus on showcasing research papers and technical prowess](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [Aim for a design that conveys trust and high-caliber expertise](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Potential to create a blog that becomes a must-read resource for AI researchers](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)

### Announcement Event Plan

  - [Create a "moment" with a pre-recorded video event, aiming for high attendance](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [Content to be 50/50 split between company success story and technical insights](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [Capture detailed content in a full-day recording session, edit down to shareable format](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)

### Amplification Strategy

  - [Leverage networks and influencers to spread the announcement](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
  - [Use LinkedIn and Twitter for initial teasers](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1827.0)
  - [Target timing around July 4th, balancing urgency with audience availability](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1856.0)

### Target Audience Considerations

  - [Primary focus on research scientists and technical decision-makers](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [Secondary goal of attracting top engineering talent](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)
  - [Aim to create broader awareness that could influence high-level decision-makers](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX team to develop initial landing page concept by Monday morning](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)
  - [Plan and schedule a full-day video recording session with Surge AI team](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1880.0)
  - [Develop promotion plan and reach out to potential amplifiers (e.g., Henry from super.com)](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=2030.0)
  - [Surge AI to provide any existing brand guidelines and cultural documents](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
  - [Coordinate on timing for the announcement, considering the July 4th holiday](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1856.0)
  - [Jean to assist with Webflow implementation of landing page once structure is decided](https://fathom.video/share/5i1Yiz8WwGYyCaud5o5P46P1Egszy7xk?tab=summary&timestamp=1957.0)
